item.title: About Me
item.author: terawhiz@gmail.com (shunt)
item.description: Hey! Welcome to my page. I’m Shunt / terawhiz, C.S undergraduate student /24. Started playing CTFs (w/5h4d0wb10k3r) in my first year of college focused on Web Exploitation In later 2021, a really talented person introduced me to Binary Exploitation. Currently holding Blue belt in pwn.college XD Not a very good writer but I’ll try blogging tech and lifestyle. And writeups. Check out my friends' blog: Well shunt doesn’t have one yet.
